lines:

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 24

---

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Petra Novak. I identified two matching bills in `50_finance/purchases/` and added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to both while preserving their original note bodies. Then I deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS before entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, treated inbox as request and verified via canonical finance records, preserved existing body text during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from `00_inbox/000_next-task.md` requested OCR of all bills related to Petra Novak. Search and reads in `50_finance/purchases/...repair_ledger_faucet_parts.md` and `...studio_parts_magnet_and_felt.md` showed both are Petra Novak-related bills. Frontmatter added according to required bill schema in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md` and migration guidance in `99_system/workflows/migrate-records-to-frontmatter.md` / `ocr-records.md`. Inbox file was then removed per `99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md` and `00_inbox/AGENTS.MD`.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to both bill files
